message:
feat(cli): add test pacing controls for E2E spawn timing

New spawnTestPacing infrastructure for controlling spawn timing in
test environments:

- resolveSpawnTestPacing(): Read pacing config from env vars when
  NTM_TEST_MODE or NTM_E2E is set
- parseEnvDurationMs(): Parse millisecond duration from env var
- Apply pane delay between tmux split-window calls
- Apply agent delay between agent launches (staggered starts)

Environment variables:
- NTM_TEST_SPAWN_DELAY_MS: Default delay for both pane and agent
- NTM_TEST_SPAWN_PANE_DELAY_MS: Override for pane creation delay
- NTM_TEST_SPAWN_AGENT_DELAY_MS: Override for agent launch delay

This enables E2E tests to control spawn timing to avoid race
conditions and ensure predictable test execution order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
